title: Red Eagles clinch 3rd place at Oyster Fest soccer tournament
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Red Eagles Football Club from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Red Eagles Football Club from Knysna secured third place in the Oyster Fest KFLA soccer tournament after edging out Sedgefield’s Young Boys FC 4-1 on penalties following a 1-1 draw at full time.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Red Eagles Football Club from Knysna secured third place in the Oyster Fest KFLA soccer tournament after edging out Sedgefield’s Young Boys FC 4-1 on penalties following a 1-1 draw at full time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams showed great determination, having been knocked out in the semi-finals.","html":"Both teams showed great determination, having been knocked out in the semi-finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Red Eagles dominated early play with quick passes and a corner kick, but the Young Boys' defence held firm.","html":"The Red Eagles dominated early play with quick passes and a corner kick, but the Young Boys' defence held firm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first half ended goalless despite both teams fighting for chances.","html":"The first half ended goalless despite both teams fighting for chances."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Young Boys FC struck first in the second half when Nkosomzi Mfene converted a penalty following a foul in the box."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, the Red Eagles equalized in the dying minutes after attacking down the wings.","html":"However, the Red Eagles equalized in the dying minutes after attacking down the wings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the shoot-out, Red Eagles held their nerve to seal the win.","html":"In the shoot-out, Red Eagles held their nerve to seal the win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinako ladies take the title","html":"Sinako ladies take the title"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the women's final, Sinako FC beat Southern Stars United 1-0, thanks to a goal from Madimpo Kalani, crowning them champions of the tournament.","html":"In the women's final, Sinako FC beat Southern Stars United 1-0, thanks to a goal from Madimpo Kalani, crowning them champions of the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results:","html":"Results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women semi-finals","html":"Women semi-finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Stars United won l8-0 against Cherished","html":"Southern Stars United won l8-0 against Cherished"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Young Bloods lost 0-5 against Sinako FC","html":"Young Bloods lost 0-5 against Sinako FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Final","html":"Final"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinako won 1-0 against Southern Stars United","html":"Sinako won 1-0 against Southern Stars United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Junior divisions","html":"Junior divisions"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U13 semi-finals","html":"U13 semi-finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Voota FC lost 1-2 against Young Bloods FC","html":"Voota FC lost 1-2 against Young Bloods FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinako FC lost 1-0 against Young Boys FC","html":"Sinako FC lost 1-0 against Young Boys FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U13 final","html":"U13 final"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinako FC won 3-0 against Young Bloods FC","html":"Sinako FC won 3-0 against Young Bloods FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U15 division finals","html":"U15 division finals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Young Bloods FC won against Sinako FC with 4 goals to 3 on penalties.","html":"Young Bloods FC won against Sinako FC with 4 goals to 3 on penalties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
